summary: Sprint 7 frontend E2E testing: role-specific dashboards, tier gating (Basic/Pro), FAB Messages tab, Broadcast tier-lock, palette role filter, topbar New role hiding. All 18 acceptance criteria from the review request passed.

design_issues.screen: Multiple role dashboards (fb, marketing, accounting, executive)
issues: Recharts console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Charts render fine but ResponsiveContainer emits warnings on initial mount; wrap chart container with a min-height/aspect prop or guard with a mounted flag to silence.

critical_code_review_comments: Recharts ResponsiveContainer emits width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on multiple dashboards (FB/Marketing/Accounting/Executive). Cosmetic but noisy in console; add minWidth/minHeight or aspect to containers.
Tier upgrade triggers full page reload; consider using React context/state so subscription changes propagate without a hard reload (better UX).
test_credentials: All 8 role emails from /app/memory/test_credentials.md, any password works.
seed_data_creation: None (all mocked in-app; tier state via localStorage 'aura_admin_tier').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified: (1) 8/8 role dashboards render correct data-testid variants (hk, front-desk, fb, spa, marketing, accounting, readonly with view-only banner, executive). (2) HK sidebar shows only Dashboard/Rooms/Housekeeping/Inventory/Notifications; Audit sidebar shows readonly-appropriate modules with Pro badges next to gated ones. (3) GM sidebar shows 5 pro-badge instances; tier-pill starts BASIC. (4) Tier gates render on /admin/rate-channel, /admin/reports, /admin/marketing on Basic; upgrading via Settings tier-switch-pro flips tier-pill to PRO, gate disappears and content loads; tier-switch-basic downgrades back. (5) FAB shows admin-fab-unread-badge='4' by default; Messages tab opens with 5 threads (Ravi Menon, Meera Kaur, Chef Vikram, Priya Nair, Karan Malhotra), thread selection shows conversation + fab-thread-input + fab-thread-send. (6) /admin/messages Broadcast: on Basic clicking broadcast-open shows broadcast-locked (not broadcast-modal); after tier=pro it shows broadcast-modal. (7) HK ⌘K palette lists ONLY Dashboard/Rooms/Housekeeping/Inventory/Notifications (no Marketing/Invoices/Rate & Channel/Reports/Settings). (8) Spa FAB quick-actions strip contains no 'New Reservation' or 'New Invoice'. (9) Audit user: topbar-new button is not rendered; dashboard-readonly renders with 'view-only' banner. Only issue is cosmetic recharts console warnings.
